# Data Quality Report

**Scan date:** 2026-07-21 · **Issues detected:** 70
**Generated by** `scripts/data_quality_doc.mjs` from `docs/data_quality_report.json`.
**Do not hand-edit** — re-run `scripts/data_quality_scan.mjs` then this script.

---

## How to read this

The scanner flags defects in the *transcription*, not in the government's performance. It
looks for encoding corruption, duplicate visible titles, and records whose detail text
contradicts their own "completed" framing.

Two rules govern every fix in this project:

1. **Quoted source text is never silently corrected.** If a Government Order or gazette
   entry contains an OCR defect, it stays — a reader must be able to match our text against
   the original PDF. Defects are flagged, not repaired.
2. **Every applied change is logged with its record ID, and IDs never change.** The logs are
   `docs/migration_currency.json` and `docs/migration_records.json`.

## Resolutions

### OCR defect 'Honble' in quoted source text - flag only, wording preserved

**Where:** `govorders.js` · **Occurrences:** 52

**Flagged, not fixed.** The string is quoted from the gazette/GO as published. Silently correcting quoted source text would break the match against the original PDF.

### rupee sign lost in transcoding ('?' before amount)

**Where:** `promises.js` · **Occurrences:** 7

**Fixed.** Rupee glyph restored; every change logged in `docs/migration_currency.json`. No amount was altered.

### marked done but detail mentions planned/ongoing components - assess components separately

**Where:** `records.js` · **Occurrences:** 6

**Flagged in data.** These records now carry `mixedStatus: true`; the interface must not present them as wholly complete. Logged in `docs/migration_records.json`.

### OCR/typo in quoted source text - flag only, wording preserved

**Where:** `govorders.js` · **Occurrences:** 2

**Flagged, not fixed.** Quoted source text is preserved verbatim so it still matches the source document.

### UTF-8 rupee sign read as Windows-1252 (mojibake)

**Where:** `promises.js` · **Occurrences:** 1

**Fixed.** Rupee glyph restored; logged in `docs/migration_currency.json`. No amount was altered.

### OCR/typo in quoted source text - flag only, wording preserved

**Where:** `legislation.js` · **Occurrences:** 1

**Flagged, not fixed.** Quoted source text is preserved verbatim so it still matches the source document.

### duplicate visible title

**Where:** `records.js` · **Occurrences:** 1

**Fixed.** Both titles disambiguated by owning scheme/department; record IDs unchanged. Logged in `docs/migration_records.json`.

## Mixed-status records

6 records are presented as achievements but their own detail
text mixes delivered components with planned or ongoing ones. They now carry
`mixedStatus: true`:

- `edu3`
- `hea4`
- `inf5`
- `eco_b2_tidel`
- `her_b2_temples`
- `env_b4_thoonmai`

This flag exists so the interface cannot present a partially-delivered programme as a
completed one. The original wording is untouched — the flag adds information rather than
replacing the government's framing with ours.

## Applied changes

### `src/data/promises.js` — 7 changes (2026-07-21)

Character-encoding repairs only. Restoring a corrupted `₹` glyph does not alter any amount,
and no other field was touched.

- Promise #10 · `note` — restored corrupted rupee glyph
- Promise #26 · `note` — restored corrupted rupee glyph
- Promise #70 · `note` — restored corrupted rupee glyph
- Promise #87 · `note` — restored corrupted rupee glyph
- Promise #178 · `note` — restored corrupted rupee glyph
- Promise #182 · `note` — restored corrupted rupee glyph
- Promise #261 · `note` — restored corrupted rupee glyph

### `src/data/records.js` — 8 changes (2026-07-21)

- `rur_b2_schools` — disambiguated title: "Rural school infrastructure" -> "Rural school classrooms (CESIDS)"
- `rur_b6_schools` — disambiguated title: "Rural school infrastructure" -> "Rural school classrooms (RD dept)"
- `edu3` — detail text mixes completed + planned/ongoing components
- `hea4` — detail text mixes completed + planned/ongoing components
- `inf5` — detail text mixes completed + planned/ongoing components
- `eco_b2_tidel` — detail text mixes completed + planned/ongoing components
- `her_b2_temples` — detail text mixes completed + planned/ongoing components
- `env_b4_thoonmai` — detail text mixes completed + planned/ongoing components

## Known gaps this scan does not cover

- **247 of 438 records have `page: null`** — no page reference back to the source volume, so
  a reader cannot spot-check them. This is the largest outstanding provenance gap; see
  `docs/EVIDENCE_MODEL.md` and `docs/SOURCE_ACQUISITION_PLAN.md`.
- The scanner checks transcription integrity, **not factual accuracy**. It cannot tell you
  whether a figure the government published is correct.
- Tamil-script fields are not linguistically validated.
